"Some places give you a bed. Always Inn gives you something else entirely — a feeling that you are known, held, and home."

Our Story

Built on love.
Sustained by presence.

Always Inn is a Tuscany-inspired bed and breakfast tucked into a lush corner of historic downtown San Clemente — one of California's most beloved Spanish-architecture beach towns. What began as a beautifully appointed inn has become something far more rare: a sanctuary shaped by one woman's extraordinary gift for knowing what people need before they ask.

"She never pried, never hovered. She simply knew. When you needed coffee before you asked. When you needed silence. When you needed a smile."

The grounds hold over a thousand plants — palms, succulents, gardenias, herbs, tropical flowers — creating a living arcade around the property. Guests arrive as strangers and leave with the warmth of something that feels like memory.

Award-winning hospitality. International-inspired breakfasts. And a host who has chosen this season of her life to give, without measure, to every soul who walks through her garden gate.

177 Avenida Cabrillo · San Clemente

What Guests Say

Stories left at the gate.

★★★★★

"Some places give you a bed. Freda's holds you. I arrived exhausted and left renewed — not by the whirlpool or the breakfast, though both were extraordinary, but by the quality of her presence."

Ryan A. — San Diego, CA

★★★★★

"The garden alone is worth the trip. Over a thousand plants. You walk in and the world slows down. The breakfast was the best I've had at any inn — anywhere. And her smile is something you carry home."

Guest Review · Airbnb

★★★★★

"Romantic getaway at its absolute finest. Three blocks to the pier, a private whirlpool bath, and a host who anticipated every single thing we needed. We've already booked our return."

Guest Review · Google
